defaults.allowResources: Search + docs; cite unfamiliar snippets. If you use AI tools, name them in your notes.

WCD-FRONT-001.title: Accessible modal with motion
WCD-FRONT-001.summary: Build a modal that traps focus, restores focus on close, respects prefers-reduced-motion, and has visible focus states.
goodLookLike: Test steps that cover keyboard and reduced-motion
antiPatterns: Modal that cannot be closed with Esc
Focus jumps to body with no return path

anchors.1: Missing focus trap or no keyboard path

WCD-3D-001.title: 2V icosahedron (55 nodes)
WCD-3D-001.summary: Implement a 2V geodesic icosahedral sphere with 55 struts/nodes, with documented vertex generation.
goodLookLike: Stated complexity or FPS on one machine
antiPatterns: Unbounded triangle count on entry hardware
deliverables: Short note on edge count and subdivision rule
FPS / triangle budget on one test machine

WCD-GRANT-001.title: NIDILRR FIP concept sketch
WCD-GRANT-001.summary: Draft a 1–2 page concept for an assistive-tech aligned project, with aims, outcomes, and alignment to federal priorities.
goodLookLike: Clear outcomes aligned to NIDILRR-style priorities

WCD-HW-001.title: DRV2605L haptic pattern library
WCD-HW-001.summary: Implement a small C/C++ (ESP-IDF) module exposing named haptic patterns with safe defaults.
goodLookLike: Named patterns for integrators to call
antiPatterns: Haptics without error handling or bounds

WCD-BE-001.title: Room presence API
WCD-BE-001.summary: Design a small Worker (or spec + pseudo-code) for room presence: join, leave, heartbeat, and abuse considerations.
goodLookLike: Abuse: rate limit + scoped tokens discussed
antiPatterns: No abuse or room-leak path considered

WCD-DES-001.title: Accessible room navigation UI
WCD-DES-001.summary: Redesign a multi-room nav pattern with focus order, mobile, and low cognitive load.
goodLookLike: Consistent focus order and touch targets

WCD-COMM-001.title: Discord onboarding flow
WCD-COMM-001.summary: Propose a written onboarding for new members (async-first), with 3 concrete steps and mod metrics.
goodLookLike: Async-first steps a mod can run weekly

WCD-DOC-001.title: meshSync API reference
WCD-DOC-001.summary: Write a short API reference (Markdown) for a fictitious `meshSync` service with one happy path and one error path.
goodLookLike: Happy and error path both documented with examples
antiPatterns: Missing auth or error code semantics
